bullets: config_lab.py: full Stage-1 grid (conf .40-.70 x edge 1.25-3.0x x three bands) replayed per lane over the resolved scored tape at archived books + actual outcomes, flat 1% compounding; Stage-2 portfolio cap sweep (max_open x domain cap x per-cluster) over merged best cells. 60/40 chronological walk-forward, fresh split daily; CANDIDATE = valid n>=30 + bootstrap CI>0 after costs + beats live config on validation + top decile BOTH segments.

Walls: reads tape only, writes reports/ only; atlas.yaml/manager/ engines hash-checked byte-identical per run; no book -> cost-unknown excluded (never estimated); invalidated politics rows out; scorecard lanes labeled pending-verdict — adoption knock only for verdict-passed lanes (none yet). Golden sanity: live config replay must equal the live ledger. Adoption = registered version bump only.
Wired into --daily after forward calibration (isolated). Report reports/config_lab.md + dashboard "CONFIG LAB" panel (dashed, hypothetical-labeled). Suite +13 lab checks.
Supersedes the never-built Frequency Instrument spec.
changelog.title: v0.13 — 2026-07-20 (CONFIG LAB v1.0 — walk-forward gate optimizer)

bullets: Resolution notifications: every settled pick now pushes to the phone (WON/LOST, P&L, new equity) alongside the existing fire pushes — manager.resolve_open_picks(cfg).

Live scanner: status.py writes data/scan_status.json + a per-run trace, and streams throttled display-only telemetry to a PUBLIC ntfy topic (atlas.yaml ntfy.scan_topic). Dashboard overview gains a "Scanner" panel: SSE live view ("SCANNING NOW: <market>") + last-run timeline. Private alert topic structurally excluded (sanitize guard); scanner text is redacted through the same blocklist (a boxer named the operator must not abort a render). Telemetry never raises, never load-bearing.
changelog.title: v0.12.1 — 2026-07-20 (position pushes + live scanner telemetry)

bullets: New domain lane #9 (registrations/2026-07-19_weather_v0.1.md, registered before first run): daily highest-temperature bucket markets, US stations only, leads ≤48h. Tag `weather_v0.1`, conf hard 0.40, scorecard-only; promotion criterion pre-registered at n≥100 resolved (Brier vs market + CI over 2× costs), FAIL final per Family-1.

Material recon finding, frozen into the registration: markets resolve off Wunderground station history pages (KLGA, KORD, KLAX, KMIA, KDAL Love Field, KBKF Buckley SFB, KSEA, KATL, KHOU Hobby, KAUS, KSFO) — NOT NWS CLI reports, and not always the obvious station. Station is parsed from each market's own resolution text, never guessed.

Phase A sandbox calibration (ticket #5): 2y of ECMWF+GFS forecasts at station coords (Open-Meteo previous-runs + historical archives) vs GHCN-D station TMAX -> per-station/lead empirical error CDFs + inverse-MSE blend weights, frozen in data/weather_calibration_v01.json. No market data touched.

engines/weather.py: discovery via Gamma search; per-city-date cluster `weather:<ICAO>:<date>`; every bucket scored; sum-to-1 sanity (±0.02) else the city-date abstains; 6 more tripwires per registration. Quota ledger data/openmeteo_quota.json (10k/day, warn 50%).

Dashboard: weather lane on the engine board; scoreboard: weather scored/day + checkpoint ETAs. Suite: +24 weather checks (parser on 11 real market texts, bucket math, CDF interpolation, tripwires, cluster, schema).

bullets: (Spec'd as v0.10.0; renumbered — v0.10 was consumed by the sandbox- ticket release earlier the same day.)

GOLDEN TEST PASS (both cadences): reproduced the 2026-07-19 first live fire — NO @ 0.77 on BTC-dip-to-$45k-by-Dec-31 (market 701502), 64.94 shares, $50.00, p_model 0.1844 vs live 0.1843 — and fired nowhere live stayed silent.
